properties.entry: SELECT user_id, role FROM users WHERE user_id = ? AND password = ?
SELECT facility_id, facility_type, facility_name, location, open_time FROM hotel_facility ORDER BY facility_id
UPDATE hotel_facility SET facility_name = ?, facility_type = ?, location = ?, open_time = ?, description = ? WHERE facility_id = ?
SELECT image_path FROM facility_image WHERE image_id = ?
INSERT INTO facility_image (facility_id, image_path, is_main) VALUES (?, ?, ?)
UPDATE facility_image SET is_main = 'N' WHERE facility_id = ?
UPDATE facility_image SET is_main = 'Y' WHERE image_id = ?
SELECT facility_id, facility_type, facility_name, location, open_time, description FROM hotel_facility WHERE facility_id = ?
SELECT image_id, image_path, is_main FROM facility_image WHERE facility_id = ?
INSERT INTO hotel_facility (facility_type, facility_name, location, open_time, description) VALUES (?,?,?,?,?)
